REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CPM ENVIRONMENTAL INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAY-11-2022 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT'S MOTION TO VACATE CLERKS ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. UNOPPOSED MOTION GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CPM ENVIRONMENTAL INC. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Clerks Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar May-11-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT's Motion To Vacate Clerks Entry Of Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to vacate clerk's entry of judgment" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
